description.text: This article brings an elaborated guide for configuring, starting and managing your projects as a project manager.

body:0001.text: How to build your first project?

body:0002.text: This guide introduces the main steps of managing projects on the Go Vocal platform:

body:0003.text: 1. Logging in and exploring the back end.

body:0004.text: Use the invitation email from your administrator, or go to your platform and click Log in.

body:0005.text: If prompted, take the onboarding tour to explore features.

body:0006.text: If the tour does not appear, contact support to activate it.

body:0010.text: Click New Project and choose from scratch or from a template.

body:0011.text: Enter project name, tags, areas, and upload pictures.

body:0014.text: Set up: update title, tags, areas, images, and URL (slug), and write a short description or use the content builder for advanced formatting.

body:0015.text: Input Tags: if using ideation, define tags for categorizing inputs.

body:0016.text: Access rights: control visibility, default assignee, and project managers.

body:0018.text: 3. Planning your project phases and participation methods.

body:0019.text: In the Timeline tab you can configure our timeline, phases and participation methods. Each phase of the timeline has a phase start/end date and a participation method. Common methods include:

body:0020.text: Collect input and feedback: gather ideas on a list or map, with voting and commenting.

body:0021.text: Proposals, petitions, initiatives: allow citizens to submit and support proposals.

body:0023.text: Voting/prioritization: participants vote or rank options (e.g., participatory budgeting).

body:0026.text: Document annotation: collect feedback directly on documents.

body:0035.text: (Premium/Enterprise) use Share to generate a test link for internal review.

body:0037.text: Click Publish to go live immediately, or

body:0038.text: Click Request Approval (Premium/Enterprise) to submit for admin/folder manager approval.

body:0041.text: Use the Audience tab to look at your project demographics, download the list of participants and monitor traffic

body:0042.text: Send direct emails via the Messaging tab.

body:0043.text: for each phase use the Notifications tab to turn automatic emails on and off

body:0045.text: Use the Input Manager to assign or reassign inputs.

body:0046.text: Move or copy inputs between phases if needed.

body:0047.text: Ensure someone is responsible for processing posts in your project settings General tab > Access rights.

body:0048.text: 6. Analyzing results and closing the project.

body:0049.text: Add a final Information phase to publish outcomes.

body:0050.text: Use the Report builder to summarize results.

body:0051.text: Apply the AI Sensemaking tool to analyze large volumes of input.

body:0052.text: Publish the report so participants are informed of the final decision.

body:0053.text: ℹ️ For more information on the participation methods on our platform to use read: Overview of our Participation methods
